About This Story

In this powerful story, Sarah and Jake face medical crises. Sarah is nineteen and loses both legs. She becomes a Paralympic snowboarder. Jake is thirteen and has cancer twice. He climbs Mount Everest after losing one lung. This story shows determination and resilience. It proves that impossible things can happen. An inspiring story about proving that the impossible is possible. 

Imagine being nineteen years old and feeling like you have everything. Then in less than twenty-four hours, your body turns purple, your lungs collapse, and doctors tell your parents you have two hours to live. Imagine being thirteen years old and being told you have three months to live. This is the story of two people who proved that the impossible is possible. 

Many people believe that when you face a serious medical crisis, your life is over. They think that losing body parts or function means you can never do the things you love again. This story proves that belief wrong.
